description: Lecture 7 introduces linear programming, emphasizing its applications and duality. It discusses the importance of linear programming in algorithmic efficiency and problem-solving, highlighting its relevance in both theoretical and practical contexts.
topic_summary: This lecture covers the transition from combinatorial optimization to linear programming, explaining its significance in algorithm design and real-world applications. It also introduces the concept of duality in linear programming, which aids in understanding optimality conditions and solution bounds [t=17:76].
